creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Patch committed, thanks!

Please note you forgot to add some new files (translations in this case) to the plist.

I took liberty to also change:

- The DISTVERSIONPREFIX to depend on PORTNAME to avoid a repetition. If necessary this can be changed in the future.

- Remove an extra slash from the repo URL, since it was causing a double slash in the final url used to fetch files.
